class.name: can_ros2_control/O6CanHardware
class.description: SocketCAN ros2_control hardware interface for LinkerHand O6/L6 compatible hands. CAN ID defaults: right hand 0x27, left hand 0x28. Command frame: 0x01 followed by six raw angle bytes.

class.name: can_ros2_control/FreedomCanHardware
class.description: SocketCAN ros2_control hardware interface for Freedom dexterous hands. Uses Freedom CAN2.0 extended-frame protocol.

class.name: can_ros2_control/InspireCanfdHardware
class.description: SocketCAN ros2_control hardware interface for Inspire RH56 series hands. Uses Inspire register protocol over CAN FD extended frames.
